{{出典の明記|date=2022年3月5日 (土) 06:53 (UTC)}}
{{日本の氏族
|家名 = Tōtsuōmi no Kuni no Miyatsuko
|家紋 = <!-- 家紋の画像 -->
|家紋名称 =
|本姓 = {{ill|Mononobe clan|ja|物部氏}}
|家祖 = {{ill|Ikimi-no-Mikoto|ja|印岐美命}}
|種別 = {{ill|Shinbetsu|ja|神別}} ({{ill|Tenson|ja|天孫}})
|出身地 = {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|大和国|lt=Ōyamato Province|lt_ja=大倭国}}
|根拠地 = Tōtsuōmi Province (later {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}})
|人物 = See [[#People|People]]
|支流 = (kabane in parentheses)<br />{{ill|Surugawa no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|珠流河国造}}<br />{{ill|Kanasashi clan|ja|金刺氏}}<br />{{ill|Kunu no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|久努国造}}<br />{{ill|Kuno clan|ja|久野氏|lt=Kunu clan|lt_ja=久努氏}} (Atai)<br />{{ill|Saya clan|ja|佐夜氏}} (Atai)<br />{{ill|Ochi no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|小市国造}}<br />{{ill|Ochi clan|ja|越智氏|lt=Ochi clan|lt_ja=小市氏}} (Atai)<br />{{ill|Kazahaya no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|風速国造}}<br />{{ill|Kazahaya clan|ja|風速氏}} (Atai)<br />{{ill|Kuji no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|久自国造}}<br />{{ill|Ōbe clan|ja|大部氏}} (Miyatsuko)
}}
'''Tōtsuōmi no Kuni no Miyatsuko''' (''tōtsuōmi no kuni no miyatsuko'', ''tōtsuōmi kokuzō'') was a {{ill|kuni no miyatsuko|ja|国造}} who ruled {{ill|Tōtsuōmi Province|ja|遠淡海国}} (western {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}}). Also known as the Tōtōmi no Kuni no Miyatsuko.

== Overview ==
*The ''{{ill|Kojiki|ja|古事記}}'' gives '''Tōtōmi no Kuni no Miyatsuko''', while the ''{{ill|Sendai Kuji Hongi|ja|先代旧事本紀}}'' gives '''Tōtsuōmi no Kuni no Miyatsuko''' and Tōtōmi no Kuni no Miyatsuko. The ''Kojiki'' also states that {{ill|Takehiratori-no-Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命}}, son of {{ill|Ame-no-Hohi-no-Mikoto|ja|天之菩卑能命}}, was the ancestor of the Tōtōmi no Kuni no Miyatsuko, and that they were of the same lineage as the {{ill|Izumo no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|出雲国造}}, {{ill|Musashi no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|武蔵国造|lt=Muzashi no Kuni no Miyatsuko|lt_ja=无邪志国造}}, {{ill|Kami-tsu-Unakami no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|上菟上国造}}, {{ill|Shimo-tsu-Unakami no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|下菟上国造}}, {{ill|Ijimu no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|伊自牟国造}}, and others.
*The "Kokuzō Hongi" of the ''Sendai Kuji Hongi'' records that '''{{ill|Ikimi-no-Mikoto|ja|印岐美命}}''', son of {{ill|Ikagashikoo|ja|伊香色雄|lt=Ikagashikoo-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=伊香色雄命}} — ancestor of the {{ill|Mononobe clan|ja|物部氏}} — was appointed Tōtsuōmi no Kuni no Miyatsuko during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Seimu|ja|成務天皇}}.
*In the "Tenson Hongi" of the ''Sendai Kuji Hongi'', '''Mononobe-Ikimi-no-Muraji-no-Kimi''' is recorded as the son of {{ill|Mononobe-no-Tōchine|ja|物部十千根|lt=Tōchine|lt_ja=十市根}} {{ill|Ōmuraji|ja|大連}} and the younger brother of {{ill|Katakataishi-no-Mikoto|ja|片堅石命}}, the ancestor of the {{ill|Suruga no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|珠流河国造|lt=Suruga no Kuni no Miyatsuko|lt_ja=駿河国造}}.
*The "Tenson Hongi" states that Ikimi-no-Muraji-no-Kimi was "the ancestor of the Shiki-no-Agatanushi, the Tōtōmi no Kuni no Miyatsuko, the Kunu-no-Atai, the Saya-no-Atai, and others."

=== Clan ===
Their primary surname is '''{{ill|Mononobe clan|ja|物部氏}}''' (''mononobe-uji''). Their {{ill|kabane|ja|氏姓|lt=kabane|lt_ja=氏姓}} is unknown.

== Base ==
=== Base ===
The base of the kuni no miyatsuko was '''{{ill|Iwata District|ja|磐田郡}}''' in {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}}, corresponding to present-day {{ill|Iwata, Shizuoka|ja|磐田市|lt=Iwata|lt_ja=磐田市}}. The Tōtōmi {{ill|provincial capital|ja|国府|lt=provincial capital|lt_ja=国府}} and {{ill|provincial temple|ja|国分寺|lt=provincial temple|lt_ja=国分寺}} were established in Iwata City.

=== Territory ===
The territory of the kuni no miyatsuko was the region then called '''Tōtsuōmi Province''', corresponding to later {{ill|Iwata District|ja|磐田郡}}, {{ill|Yamaka District|ja|山香郡}}, {{ill|Nagakami District|ja|長上郡}}, {{ill|Nagashimo District|ja|長下郡}}, and others of Tōtōmi Province.

As for the territory of the kuni no miyatsuko, there are theories that it was the area around {{ill|Lake Hamana|ja|浜名湖}}, the area west of the {{ill|Tenryū River|ja|天竜川}}, the area from Lake Hamana to the western edge of {{ill|Iwata-hara|ja|磐田|lt=Iwata-hara|lt_ja=磐田原}}, and the area from Lake Hamana to the {{ill|Ōta River (Shizuoka)|ja|太田川|lt=Ōta River|lt_ja=太田川}} basin.

== Tutelary Shrine ==
=== Enshrined Shrines ===
*'''{{ill|Ōmi-Kunitama Shrine|ja|淡海國玉神社}}''' (''ōmi-kunitama-jinja'')
*:A shrine located in {{ill|Mitsuke|ja|見付|lt=Mitsuke|lt_ja=見付}}, {{ill|Iwata, Shizuoka|ja|磐田市|lt=Iwata City|lt_ja=磐田市}}. The {{ill|sōja|ja|惣社}} of {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}}, enshrining {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|lt=Ōkuninushi-no-Kami|lt_ja=大国主神}} as its deity.

=== Related Shrines ===
*{{ill|Okuni Shrine|ja|小国神社}} (''okuni-jinja'')
*:An {{ill|ichi-no-miya|ja|一の宮|lt=ichi-no-miya|lt_ja=一宮}} of Tōtōmi Province located in {{ill|Mori, Shizuoka|ja|森町 (静岡県)|lt=Mori Town|lt_ja=森町}} of {{ill|Shūchi District|ja|周智郡}}, enshrining {{ill|Ōnamuchi-no-Kami|ja|大己貴神}} as its deity.

=== Tombs ===
*{{ill|Chōshizuka Kofun (Iwata)|ja|銚子塚古墳 (磐田市)|lt=Chōshizuka Kofun|lt_ja=銚子塚古墳}} (''chōshizuka kofun'')
*:A 108 m-long {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|ja|前方後円墳}} in Teratani, {{ill|Iwata, Shizuoka|ja|磐田市|lt=Iwata City|lt_ja=磐田市}}, thought to have been built in the latter half of the 4th century.
*{{ill|Shōrinzan Kofun|ja|松林山古墳}} (''shōrinzan kofun'')
*:A 107 m-long {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|ja|前方後円墳}} in Shingai, {{ill|Iwata, Shizuoka|ja|磐田市|lt=Iwata City|lt_ja=磐田市}}, thought to have been built in the latter half of the 4th century.
*{{ill|Dōyama Kofun Cluster (Iwata)|ja|堂山古墳群 (磐田市)|lt=Dōyama Kofun|lt_ja=堂山古墳}} (''dōyama kofun'')
*:A {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|ja|前方後円墳}} with a mound length of about 110 m in Higashi-Kaizuka, {{ill|Iwata, Shizuoka|ja|磐田市|lt=Iwata City|lt_ja=磐田市}}, thought to have been built in the 5th century.
== Footnotes ==
{{脚注ヘルプ}}
{{Reflist}}

== References ==
* ''Kokushi Daijiten'' ({{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川弘文館}})
* Sakamoto Tarō, Hirano Kunio, ''Nihon Kodai Shizoku Jinmei Jiten'' (Yoshikawa Kōbunkan)
* ''Nihon Kodai Jinmei Jiten'' (Yoshikawa Kōbunkan)
* ''Nihon-shi Kō-jiten'' ({{ill|Yamakawa Shuppansha|ja|山川出版社}})
* ''Shintō Daijiten'' (Rinsen Shoten)
* ''Nihon-shi Sōran'' ({{ill|Shinjinbutsu Ōraisha|ja|新人物往来社}})

== See also ==
* {{ill|List of Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|国造の一覧}}
{{Japanese-history-stub}}
{{pref-stub|pref=静岡県}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:とおつおうみのくにのみやつこ}}
[[Category:遠江国|くにのみやつこ]]
[[Category:出雲氏|*とおつおうみのくにのみやつこ]]
[[Category:物部氏|-とおつおうみのくにのみやつこ]]
[[Category:静岡県の歴史]]
[[Category:Kuni no miyatsuko]]
[[ja:遠淡海国造]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
